items.title: Binance adds prediction market to its app for millions of users

items.summary: Hyperliquid data showed a 145 million Fartcoin position unwound across wallets, with the platform redistributing about $849,000 in gains to opposing traders.

items.title: DOJ and CFTC seek halt to Arizona action against Kalshi
items.summary: The US Justice Department and commodities regulator asked a federal court to block Arizona’s action against Kalshi, arguing federally regulated event contracts fall under CFTC jurisdiction.

items.summary: Bitcoin Depot said a hacker stole 50.9 BTC, worth about $3.7 million, after gaining access to internal systems linked to corporate wallets.

items.title: Tokenized perpetual swaps hit $31 billion weekly volume on commodities volatility
items.summary: Commodities led the growth, with oil trading reaching $6.9 billion in weekly volume after geopolitical tensions, while stock perpetual swaps grew 908% to roughly $4.9 billion.

items.title: Gold, silver and oil drive 65,000% jump in commodity perpetuals
items.summary: BitMEX said commodity perpetual swaps volume jumped from $38.1 million to $25 billion in Q1 as traders flocked to 24/7 gold, silver and oil exposure.

items.title: Fartcoin Leads Altcoin Slump With Double-Digit Drop

items.title: Fartcoin's price crashed 50% after $145 million manipulation bet went wrong
items.summary: The liquidation was so large relative to the order book that Hyperliquid's auto-deleveraging mechanism activated, forcibly closing profitable short positions on the other side of the trade to prevent the system from accumulating bad debt.

items.title: Bitcoin’s $80,000 bull bet just took over the market
